description: Replace the recurring schedule cron text input with a recurrence builder UI in the workflow schedule dialog.
Support daily recurrence selection with a time-of-day input.
Support weekly recurrence selection with weekday controls and time-of-day input.
Support monthly recurrence selection with day-of-month and time-of-day input.
Convert supported GUI recurrence settings into cron strings before create and update saves.
Hydrate supported saved cron expressions back into the recurrence builder when editing schedules.
Provide an advanced cron disclosure that exposes the raw cron input as an escape hatch.
Default unsupported recurring cron expressions to advanced mode without losing the saved cron value.
Show a human-readable schedule summary for supported recurrence builder selections.
Keep one-time schedule behavior unchanged while applying the new UX only to recurring schedules.
